title: feat: add /v1/models/status endpoint (Tinybird proxy with cache)
author: YoannDev90
pr_body_excerpt:
Exposes **GET /v1/models/status?minutes=60**

- Returns the raw Tinybird `model_health` public pipe response
- Validates `minutes` as an integer from 1 to 1440
- Uses a 60s in-memory cache keyed by `minutes`, with stale fallback on upstream error
- OpenAPI docs added via `describeRoute` (visible in Scalar UI under Monitor)

Fixes #9263

gist.headline: The hive's heartbeat
gist.blurb: Added a new /v1/models/status endpoint so you can check the health of our models in real-time. Keep an eye on the hive's pulse with up to 24 hours of cached history.
gist.summary: Added a new GET /v1/models/status endpoint that proxies Tinybird's model health data, featuring a 60-second cache and a configurable minutes parameter (1-1440).
gist.impact: Developers can now programmatically check the real-time health and uptime of all models directly through the API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a doctor or system admin, checking the health of the models. A retro monitor showing a heartbeat line or status bars. Medical/health metaphor mixed with tech.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny doctor's stethoscope, checking the health of a glowing retro server rack. A chunky CRT monitor nearby displays a green heartbeat line and status bars. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
